mapper.sql: id, module, prompt_key, content, version, sort_order, description, is_active, effective_from, effective_to, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_prompts WHERE module = #{module} AND prompt_key = #{promptKey} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_prompts WHERE module = #{module} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, version DESC
SELECT FROM ai_prompts WHERE module = #{module} AND prompt_key = #{promptKey} ORDER BY version DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_prompts (module, prompt_key, content, version, sort_order, description, is_active, effective_from, effective_to, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{module}, #{promptKey}, #{content}, #{version}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{isActive}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_prompts SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_prompts WHERE module = #{module} AND prompt_key = #{promptKey}
